title: Refleksi di Balik Dinding Kaca
theme: Menjelajahi ruang-ruang sepi di antara kesibukan kota, seseorang menemukan ketenangan dalam refleksi diri akan pilihan hidup dan makna kehadiran.

cover.prompt: A serene, minimalist apartment lobby, 'The Solstice,' bathed in the soft, warm light of late afternoon. Floor-to-ceiling glass walls prominently reflect a luminous city skyline. A cool gray marble floor extends towards a single, inviting mustard modular sofa, positioned with elegant simplicity. A subtle, distant silhouette of a person stands contemplatively, observing the city. Cinematic composition with a focus on reflections and architectural elegance, gentle illumination, rule of thirds.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading, minimalist composition, gentle illumination

meta.plan_summary: A young freelancer, Arya, finds solace observing his minimalist apartment lobby, contrasting his aimless routine with the purposeful lives of others. When a lift malfunction traps him alone, he's forced to confront his reflection and deep-seated questions about life's meaning and happiness. This moment of forced introspection leads to a calmer perspective, accepting the journey and finding peace in self-acceptance and observing life's small details, rather than chasing ambiguous end goals.
